name: Drop Biscuit Swirl
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the baking mix and milk in a large bowl and stir until almost blended.
2. Gently swirl in the fruit conserve.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto a greased baking sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
4. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Makes enough for 4 biscuits.
